description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI_MacOS that runs on pushes to devel and cvmfs* branches, on pull requests to those branches, and on workflow dispatch. Use a macos-latest job to check out the repository, perform debug output, install Fuse-t and dependencies, build CVMFS, set up firmlinks, install CVMFS, set up CVMFS, run tests, and upload test logs as an artifact.
